scripts.prepare:wrangler: node -e "const fs=require('node:fs');const transitId=process.env.TRANSIT_CACHE_KV_ID?.trim();if(!transitId){console.error('Missing required environment variable: TRANSIT_CACHE_KV_ID');process.exit(1);}const tokensId=process.env.CLIENT_TOKENS_KV_ID?.trim();if(!tokensId){console.error('Missing required environment variable: CLIENT_TOKENS_KV_ID');process.exit(1);}const hostname=process.env.WORKER_HOSTNAME?.trim();if(!hostname){console.error('Missing required environment variable: WORKER_HOSTNAME');process.exit(1);}const source='wrangler.jsonc';const output='.wrangler.generated.jsonc';const config=fs.readFileSync(source,'utf8');if(!config.includes('__TRANSIT_CACHE_KV_ID__')){console.error('Missing __TRANSIT_CACHE_KV_ID__ placeholder in wrangler.jsonc');process.exit(1);}if(!config.includes('__CLIENT_TOKENS_KV_ID__')){console.error('Missing __CLIENT_TOKENS_KV_ID__ placeholder in wrangler.jsonc');process.exit(1);}if(!config.includes('__WORKER_HOSTNAME__')){console.error('Missing __WORKER_HOSTNAME__ placeholder in wrangler.jsonc');process.exit(1);}fs.writeFileSync(output,config.replace('__TRANSIT_CACHE_KV_ID__',transitId).replace('__CLIENT_TOKENS_KV_ID__',tokensId).replace('__WORKER_HOSTNAME__',hostname));console.log('Generated', output, 'with TRANSIT_CACHE_KV_ID, CLIENT_TOKENS_KV_ID, and WORKER_HOSTNAME');"
